span.p: Integration looks healthy but is it?

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
200 on the envelope is NOT 200 on sub-requests.
Inspect each responses[] status: a sub-request can be 429/4xx.
Retry only the failed sub-requests by their own Retry-After.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
A long pause can silently age out the token.
Expect 410 on resume; have a resync branch. Build for replays + consistency lag.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Webhooks are best-effort: a notification can be dropped.
Treat 'missed' as a resync-via-delta trigger, not an error.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SILENT DEATH: subscription expires with no error.
Green monitoring is NOT proof of life. Add renewal + lifecycleNotificationUrl + delta resync.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
